snapshots.label: Pre-tournament baseline (2026-06-11)
snapshots.notes: Frozen pre-tournament reference forecast; seed 20260611, 2000 iterations, no completed results locked.

snapshots.label: Historical manual checkpoint (after M54, 2026-06-25)
snapshots.notes: Live-aware forecast from the committed public-safe manual sample as of 2026-06-25 after 54 completed group-stage matches; seed 20260611, 2000 iterations. Historical/manual checkpoint, not the latest provider-derived live-state.

snapshots.label: Provider-public-delayed checkpoint (all 72 group matches locked, 2026-06-29)
snapshots.notes: Live-aware forecast from the sanitized provider-derived live-state as of 2026-06-29 (provider-public-delayed). All 72 group-stage matches locked; seed 20260611, 2000 iterations. The provider also had M73 (R32, Canada) complete, but knockout result locking is deferred to PR-3E so it is not yet reflected. Suffix 072 = latest completed LOCKED match number, not latest provider-completed match.

snapshots.label: Provider-public-delayed checkpoint (72 group matches + R32 M73 locked, 2026-06-29)
snapshots.notes: Live-aware forecast from the sanitized provider-derived live-state as of 2026-06-29 (provider-public-delayed). All 72 group-stage matches plus the completed Round of 32 match M73 (Canada over South Africa) locked via the PR-3E generic knockout engine; seed 20260611, 2000 iterations. Canada is advanced to the Round of 16 (prob 1.0) and South Africa eliminated. Suffix 073 = latest completed LOCKED match number.
